title: ctenitis blepharochlamys
intro: Ctenitis blepharochlamys, also known as the Blepharochlamys fern, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. It is native to the tropical regions of Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Ctenitis blepharochlamys include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into a tea or used in combination with other herbs to create a medicinal infusion or tincture.
